summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 1 Time Tracking features. All 12 requested features tested and working correctly. Backend tests (13 tests) passed 100%. Frontend UI tests completed successfully with all timer, time log, and task features verified.
seed_data_creation: Created test task with 3 auto-subtasks (Research Phase, Development Phase, Testing Phase)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 Time Tracking features fully tested and working. Timer pause/resume, time log edit/delete, task creation with auto-subtasks all verified.

project_task_subtask_cascading_selection.details: Project dropdown enables Task dropdown, Task dropdown enables Subtask dropdown. Shows 'Track on parent task' + available subtasks

start_timer_with_billable_toggle.details: Timer starts with selected task, billable toggle works, shows running timer display

pause_timer.details: Pause button pauses timer, shows PAUSED badge, changes button to Resume

resume_timer.details: Resume button resumes timer, removes PAUSED badge, changes button back to Pause

stop_and_log_timer.details: Stop & Log creates time entry, resets timer UI, shows success toast

manual_time_entry.details: Add Time Log dialog with Project/Task/Subtask selection, Duration, Date, Description, Billable toggle

edit_time_log.details: Edit dialog opens with current values, can update Duration, Date, Description, Billable

delete_time_log.details: Delete with confirmation dialog, removes entry from list, shows success toast

weekly_timesheet_view.details: Shows Sun-Sat columns with Date, Total hours, Billable hours (green), Entries count, Week Total row

create_task_with_auto_subtasks.details: Auto-Create Subtasks section allows adding multiple subtasks, button updates to 'Create Task with N Subtasks'

nest_task_under_existing_parent.details: 'Nest Under Task (Optional)' dropdown appears after project selection with parent task options

expandable_subtask_tree_view.details: Chevron icons expand/collapse subtasks, subtasks shown with indent arrow icon

pause_resume_buttons.details: Ribbon shows on all pages when timer active, Pause/Resume/Stop & Log buttons work, PAUSED badge appears

mocked_apis.note: Google Drive, Gmail, and Zoho Sign integrations are in DEMO MODE as specified
